violations.detail: Static field 'instance' is placed in the factory section; fields belong in the instance section
Constructor is 'protected' but should be package-private (no access modifier)
PageGroup extends SubComponent directly instead of PageSubComponent base class
Modifier interface imported as outer class 'org.patternfly.style.Modifiers' and referenced as 'Modifiers.Fill'; should import 'org.patternfly.style.Modifiers.Fill' directly
Interfaces not in alphabetical order: ElementContainerDelegate should come before Fill
Private non-final field 'keepExpanded' appears before private final field 'toggleHandler'; final fields should precede non-final fields within the same visibility group
